heading: Liquid carbon dioxide systems used in beverage dispensing applications. Liquid carbon dioxide systems used in beverage dispensing applications. Liquid carbon dioxide systems with more than 100 pounds (45.4 kg) of carbon dioxide used in beverage dispensing applications shall comply with Section 5307.3.1.
verbatim:
(58)	Section 5601.2.4.2, "Fireworks display," is amended by the addition of the following:
The city manager shall require a certificate of insurance to protect persons and property from death or injury as a result of the fireworks display, in an amount not less than $1,000,000 general liability per occurrence and $2,000,000 aggregate limit. The insurance shall cover any liability of the city, or any employee or agent thereof arising out of or connected with the permit and the fireworks display permitted thereunder. Before any permit for a fireworks display is issued, the applicant shall comply with the provisions of this section.
